description_long: This is an adult male figure with a full beard and spiky, medium-length hair. He is dressed in a short-sleeved shirt under a pair of overalls, which are fitted and extend to the ankles. The figure is wearing open-toed sandals, exposing the feet. His arms are relaxed at his sides, and his posture is upright and natural. The clothing appears casual and suitable for everyday urban environments. The overall appearance suggests a relaxed, approachable pedestrian commonly seen in city streets or parks.
description: A casually dressed adult male with a beard, spiky hair, overalls, and sandals, standing upright. His attire and posture suggest a relaxed urban pedestrian.
description_view_0: Front view showing the beard, spiky hair, short-sleeved shirt, overalls, and sandals.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the face, beard, and the fit of the overalls.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the overalls, shirt, and hairstyle.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the arm, side of the overalls, and sandal details.
attribute_hairstyle: medium-length spiky hair with full beard
